name: Fantasy (Perfect) Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir together margarine, sugar, and milk in a heavy 3-quart saucepan.
2. Bring to full boil, stirring constantly.
3. Boil for 5 minutes over medium heat, or until the candy thermometer reaches 234°F (constant stirring to prevent scorching).
4. Remove from heat. Gradually stir in chocolate chips until melted.
5. Add remaining ingredients and mix until well blended.
6. Pour into a greased 9x9 inch or 13x9 inch pan.
7. Cool at room temperature.
8. Cut into squares.
Makes about 3 pounds of fudge.
